preferred_skills: Lean Six Sigma Black Belt Methodologies
Sustainability and ESG Supply Chain Initiatives
responsibilities: Lead end-to-end supply chain operations by coordinating planning, procurement, logistics, and inventory management activities across multiple business units.
Develop strategic supply chain initiatives that improve service levels, reduce operational costs, and enhance overall network efficiency.
Manage supplier relationships, contract performance, and procurement activities to ensure reliable material availability and cost competitiveness.
Implement inventory optimization programs that balance customer service requirements with working capital and storage cost objectives.
Collaborate with executive leadership to establish supply chain performance targets, operational roadmaps, and long-term growth strategies.
Drive continuous improvement initiatives using Lean Six Sigma methodologies to eliminate inefficiencies and improve operational productivity.
Oversee risk management processes by developing contingency plans for supplier disruptions, transportation delays, and demand volatility.
Monitor supply chain KPIs through executive dashboards and present actionable recommendations to support data-driven business decisions.
